source_pr.title: *: update pd and kvproto vendor
source_pr.body:
### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->
For implementing _reverse_seek_ feature, we need the support of _GetPrevRegion_ API which is supported in the latest PD.

### What is changed and how it works?
Update related vendoring repos for later introducing of _reverse_seek_.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test
 - Integration test

symptoms: - // reduces allocations. However, if you have any use-after-finish race
failure_signature: - // reduces allocations. However, if you have any use-after-finish race
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: *: update pd and kvproto vendor.

evidence: evidence: - // reduces allocations. However, if you have any use-after-finish race
